meta.note: Canonical brand values. Read these verbatim; never approximate brand colors or type from memory. Contains brand expression only — no commercial or strategic information.

navy.use: Primary dark. Hero and section backgrounds, card bodies, logo plane body on light grounds.

green.use: THE brand green. All actions, labels, icons, highlights, and accents on any ground. Default to this.

greenPunch.use: Punch accent ONLY. At most one intentional emphasis moment per page or asset. Never for buttons, labels, charts, or recurring UI.

teal.use: Heritage accent. Subheads, links, mid-sentence callouts in documents and decks. Data viz series 3.

steel.use: Secondary blue. Data viz series 2, supporting UI, diagrams.

slate.use: Muted blue-gray. Captions, secondary labels, chart gridlines and axis labels.

gray.use: Deck system: slide headers and body text on white.

coral.use: ILLUSTRATION ONLY. The glowing path/node accent in paper-cut scenes. Never a UI, chart, or text color.

mint.use: Soft gradient stop A. Light card and panel surfaces.

ice.use: Soft gradient stop B. Pairs with mint at 135 degrees.

white.use: Plane body on navy grounds; light surfaces.

soft.use: Standard light surface for panels, expanded cards, alternating sections.

green.use: Counts as a punch usage — same one-per-asset rule.

wing.use: Official paper-plane wing: deep teal at tail to light green at nose. Motif use only.

primary.use: The brand typeface (Kastelov). Carries every role; weight does the hierarchy work.

fallback.use: Approved free substitute when Axiforma is unavailable. The ONLY acceptable substitute.

layout.angleBreak: 2-4 degree diagonal between sections; echoes the plane wing
layout.archetype: navy hero, then alternating navy/soft-gradient sections joined by angled breaks; each section opens with centered eyebrow + H2 + lede

navigation.structure: Two-row layout: logo/wordmark on its own first row, navigation links on a second row below

dataViz.labels: Axiforma/Poppins, slate for axes, navy for emphasis, 8-11px
dataViz.strokeWeight: 3px with 3px radius on bars and line caps
dataViz.rules: No 3D, no heavy borders, no chart-junk, no background fills. Punch green never appears in charts.

motif.paperPlane: Wing is the gradient blade (#62D38C nose to #30737B tail). Body navy on light grounds, white on navy. Never outlined, never flat green. Use the official SVG paths, not redrawn geometry.
motif.flightPath: Round dots (stroke-dasharray 0.1 8, round caps, ~3px), navy on light / white on navy. Every trail includes at least one loop. Never straight, never dashed. Five canonical variants — A Single loop, B S-wave, C Tight coil, D Wide arc, E Double curl — are defined in the style guide. New paths should follow the same hand-flown character.
motif.icons: Bold navy outlines (~3.5px at 48px grid) with a single flat green fill element. On navy, outlines invert to white; green fills stay green.
